name: cf-headers
description: Type-safe _headers file generator for Cloudflare Pages & Workers static assets, with a full catalog of HTTP response headers (status, deprecation, and reference info) and autocomplete for header names and values.

scripts.example:basic: bun run build && node dist/cli.mjs --config examples/basic/cf-headers.config.ts --out-dir examples/basic && cat examples/basic/_headers
scripts.example:production: bun run build && node dist/cli.mjs --config examples/production/cf-headers.config.ts --out-dir examples/production && cat examples/production/_headers
scripts.example:cli: bun run example:basic && bun run example:production
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
